from manim import *

class CycloidPath(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Section 1 — Setup
        title = Text("Cycloid Path", font_size=36, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(title))

        circle = Circle(radius=1.0, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.0, stroke_width=4)
        circle.shift(LEFT * 4)
        self.play(Create(circle))

        point = Dot(point=circle.get_center(), radius=0.08, color=RED)
        self.play(Create(point))

        path = VGroup()
        self.play(self.camera.frame.animate.scale(0.8))

        # Section 2 — Main concept
        for i in range(360 * 3):
            angle = i * DEGREES
            x = (angle / 360) * 2 * PI * 1 - np.sin(angle * DEGREES)
            y = -np.cos(angle * DEGREES)
            new_point = Dot(point=[x, y, 0], radius=0.01, color=YELLOW)
            path.add(new_point)
            self.add(new_point)
            self.remove(point)
            point = new_point
            self.wait(1/60)

        self.wait(1.5)

        # Section 3 — Conclusion
        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
